Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Jul-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF LESLIE SONG'S Motion For Reconsideration (re April 10, 2006 order sustaining defendant Daniel Ray Bacon's demurrer without leave to amend).
APPEARANCE: Leslie B. Song, 753-9898 pltf & moving party in propria persona; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - denied. The motion is untimely per C.C.P. 1008. (301/EHG/DS) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-10-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DANIEL RAY BACON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OF LESLIE B. SONG.
APPEARANCE: Leslie B. Song, 753-9898 pltf & opposing party in propria persona; no other appearances. (Note: Pltf filed an objection on 03/29/06 that the Court reviewed & found to not be an opposition to the demurrer.)
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. - SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Court to prepare form of order. (301/JLW/ju) Judge: James L. Warren, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
